# Blumnai Design System

> React component library with 40+ components, 4 themes, and accessibility support. Package: @blumnai-studio/blumnai-design-system

## Documentation

- [AI Reference](AI.md): Complete component catalog, props, and patterns for AI agents
- [README](README.md): Installation, setup, and usage guide
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md): Development setup, coding standards, and project structure

## Key Files

- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): AI agent development instructions (typography, spacing, color rules)
- [Package Config](package.json): Exports, dependencies, and subpath configuration

## Optional

- [Workflow Report](AI-WORKFLOW-REPORT.md): AI-assisted development methodology documentation
